examples.title: Distance from Velocity Graph
examples.content: Constant velocity of 10 m/s for 5 seconds. Area = height × width = 10 × 5 = 50 meters distance. Works!

examples.title: Work from Force Graph
examples.content: Force of 50 N over 10 meters distance. Area under the line = 50 × 10 = 500 Joules of work.

examples.title: Acceleration Triangle
examples.content: Velocity changes from 0 to 20 m/s over 5 seconds. Triangular area = ½ × base × height = ½ × 5 × 20 = 50 meters. Distance traveled!
